scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "redis,api,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "bun run redis" "bun run api" "bun run web"
scripts.redis: docker start safar-redis 2>/dev/null || docker run --name safar-redis -p 6379:6379 -d redis:7-alpine
scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
